column1: # Freedman 2025 CCHP Status Report Table 3 — CCHP HST+JWST TRGB and R22 Cepheid Distances (FULL augmented sample)
# Transcribed 2026-04-25 from the arXiv LaTeX source `Ho2024.tex` lines 492-524.
#   The published TRGB H₀ = 70.39 ± 1.22 (stat) ± 1.33 (sys) km/s/Mpc IS DERIVED from this
#   Table 2's 11-SN JWST-only subset. Table 4 explicitly lists:
#     "70.39 +1.23 -1.21  TRGB + CSP B band ; 24 SN calibrators
#   The 11-SN JWST-only subset gives H₀ = 68.81 ± 1.80 (Table 4 line at z>0.01).
#   SN              SN Ia calibrator name (no "SN" prefix)
#   mu_TRGB_JWST    JWST F115W TRGB distance modulus (mag); empty if not measured
#   sigma_TRGB_JWST 1σ on mu_TRGB_JWST; empty if absent
#   mu_TRGB_F19F21  HST TRGB distance modulus from Freedman 2019 (F19) / Freedman 2021 (F21); empty if absent
#   mu_TRGB_CCHP    Combined CCHP HST+JWST TRGB distance modulus (the AUGMENTED quantity used in §9)
#   mu_Ceph_R22     Cepheid distance modulus from Riess et al. 2022; empty if absent
#   has_F090W_TRGB  1 if a TRGB distance from F090W archival data exists (footnote a)
#   in_augmented    1 if SN is in the 24-SN augmented analysis sample (excludes 2021pit per §9)

column2: JWST distances only" subset = SNe whose mu_TRGB_JWST is non-empty
